info.name: Prefilter API — Seed Data Tests
info.description:
Test cases generated from seed_local.py data.
Base URL: http://localhost:8002
Endpoint: POST /prefilter/search

Seed summary:
  hpp_1 — Phòng khám Đa khoa Q1 HCM  (10.7769, 106.7009) | TRADITIONAL_MEDICINE, SPA_BEAUTY
    └─ pro_1: Tư vấn tim mạch 350k
    └─ pro_5: Làm sạch răng 300k
  hpp_2 — Vật lý trị liệu Bình Minh Q3 HCM (10.7760, 106.6916) | MASSAGE_REHABILITATION, MASSAGE_THERAPY
    └─ pro_2: Vật lý trị liệu thoát vị 800k (sale 720k)
    └─ pro_4: Tư vấn tâm lý 400k (sale 350k)
  hpp_3 — Đông y Gia truyền Hoàn Kiếm HN  (21.0315, 105.8487) | TRADITIONAL_MEDICINE
    └─ pro_3: Châm cứu bấm huyệt 500k

item.name: 01 — GPS + massage (expect: pro_2, pro_4)
item._expect: MASSAGE_THERAPY → hpp_2, radius 5km, distance sort. Candidates: pro_2, pro_4

item.name: 03 — Location Hà Nội không có GPS (expect: pro_3)
item._expect: TRADITIONAL_MEDICINE + LOC Hà Nội. Fallback TH2 province filter. Candidates: pro_3

item.name: 04 — Location quận Hoàn Kiếm (expect: pro_3)
item._expect: TRADITIONAL_MEDICINE + LOC Hoàn Kiếm (DISTRICT). Candidates: pro_3

item.name: 05 — Price filter dưới 400k (expect: pro_1 350k, pro_4 350k sale, pro_5 300k)
06 — Price + GPS (expect: pro_5 300k gần Q1)
item._expect: DENTAL + maxPrice=400000 + GPS radius. Candidates: pro_5 (300k)

item.name: 07 — Semantic: đau răng (no keyword, expect DENTAL → pro_5)
09 — Semantic: mất ngủ stress (expect PSYCHOLOGY → pro_4)
10 — Rating cao HCM (expect: products avg_rating DESC)
item._expect: MASSAGE_REHABILITATION + LOC HCM + minRating=4.0. Candidates: pro_2

item.name: 11 — Price range 300k-500k (expect: pro_1 350k, pro_3 500k, pro_4 350k, pro_5 300k)
item._expect: minPrice=300000 maxPrice=500000. Candidates: pro_1, pro_3, pro_4, pro_5

item.name: 12 — GPS + all (no filter, distance sort)
item._expect: TH1, no BT filter, all HCM partners within 5km sorted by distance. Candidates: pro_1..5 (exclude pro_3 HN)

item.name: 13 — Combine GPS + category + price
item._expect: MASSAGE_REHABILITATION + GPS + maxPrice=800000. Candidates: pro_2 (720k sale)

item.name: 14 — No GPS, no location → text-only (expect: ORDER BY created_at)
item._expect: TRADITIONAL_MEDICINE keyword, no spatial. TH=None, ORDER BY created_at. Candidates: pro_3

item.name: 15 — Empty text (expect: 200 OK, empty candidates)
item._expect: No entities extracted, fallback or empty list
